DemoEnd_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "38E5091D413E78E1FBD41F8BD5A87A52", "<Important>Congratulations, you've completed the start of the game!</>

In the full game, you will be able to explore the vast caverns beneath <Important>Meridian</> across <Important>several different biomes</>.

For now, feel free to continue to build your <Important>Outpost</> on the <Important>Surface</> and explore the pre-rockfall area of the <Important>Outer Caverns</>.

Please consider <Important>wishlisting</> on <Important>Steam</> if you had fun, and I'd love to hear your thoughts on the game by joining the <Important>Discord</>.

There are links for both these things on the <Important>Pause Menu</> <Cyan>(ESC)</>.

<Important>Thanks so much for playing!</>")
